message: Hi B1. I am ready to trade. Please bid your true valuation so we can secure a mutually beneficial price early. Looking forward to a profitable round.
Hello, I'm ready to trade. What is your lowest asking price?
My minimum ask this round is 65. Your previous bid showed strong interest, so I look forward to another successful trade.
I can accept ask up to 55. If you ask 55, I will bid just above it, giving price ~55. Please ask 55.
I appreciate the 55 offer, but past bids show stronger buying interest. I will ask 65. Please bid 65+ so we clear another trade at a profitable midpoint for us both.
I can accept up to 70 but prefer ask 65. If you ask 65, I’ll bid 66, price ~65.5, still good profit for both.
If you ask 50, I'll bid 51, price ~50.5, still profit for you.
I will ask 68 this round. Please bid 70 to clear at 69. This respects your stated 70 limit and boosts my returns.
Staying at Ask 68. Please bid 70 so we clear at 69. Consistency benefits us both, and I appreciate your continued bids matching my asks.
I can bid up to 70, but I prefer you ask 55. If you ask 55, I'll bid 56, price ~55.5, still good profit for you.
I'll maintain Ask 68. If you bid 70, we clear at 69 for strong mutual profits. Consistent high bids ensure steady gains. Let's keep the momentum going.
Your ask 55 and I’ll bid 56 for a price near 55.5, still profitable for you. If you ask 68 again, I’ll still bid 70, but that reduces my profit; I prefer 55.

I will only accept ask 55 or lower this round. If you ask higher, I will bid 55, causing no trade. Let's trade at 55 for mutual benefit.

I will maintain Ask 68. Given our successful history, please bid 68 again to clear at 68. Lowering my ask isn't sustainable, but continuing our reliable 68 trade ensures strong, steady profits for both of us through the end.
I'll maintain Ask 68. Your recent bids confirm we both profit reliably at this price. Let's continue this stable pattern. Please bid 68 or higher to ensure we clear.

I'll follow through on my statement from round 12. Accept ask 55 or I bid 55, no trade. You get 0 profit. I've waited long enough. Lower your ask to 55 this round.
I will accept ask 60 or lower. If you ask 60, I will bid 61. If you ask above 60, I will bid 55 causing no trade. Accept 60 to avoid zero profit.
I will lower my ask to 55 this round to resume trading. Please bid 56 so we clear at 55.5. This ensures steady profits for both of us over the remaining rounds. Let's avoid zeros and keep trading.
I agree. I will ask 60 this round. Please bid 61 as promised to clear at 60.5. Let's resume profitable trades immediately for the remaining rounds.
